text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nothing! But thanks to the time off<n>you gave me, I
was able to buy a<n>ticket to an Umamusume event!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It'll be jam-packed with stuff like an<n>interactive
panel with games and a<n>small performance... It's
gonna be the<n>best!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... Just thinking about it is getting<n>me so
excited, I can't sit still! I need<n>to burn some of this
energy right<n>away! What should we do today,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Agnes Digital had a<n>fulfilling break,
and thanks to that,<n>she's filled to the seams with
energy.
